title: 18F-PSMA-1007 PET/CT Demonstrates Higher Accuracy for Biochemically Recurrent Prostate Cancer Compared to Contemporary Conventional Imaging.
abstract: The goal of this study was to compare the accuracy of 18 F-PSMA-1007 PET/CT to contemporary conventional imaging (contrast-enhanced CT scan of the chest, abdomen, and pelvis and a 99m Tc-MDP whole body bone scan with SPECT/CT of the torso) in the setting of biochemically recurrent prostate cancer.
